Ebook.title: E-Book Document
Ebook.description: Metadata for uploaded E-Book and PDF

pdfUrl.description: Download URL or local blob URL of the PDF

coverUrl.description: Data URL or download URL of the first page cover image

totalPages.description: Total pages in the PDF document

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the E-Book was uploaded

description.description: Brief synopsis or description of the book

category.description: Book category (e.g. นิยาย, คู่มือ, การศึกษา, นิตยสาร, การ์ตูน, ทั่วไป)

ebooks/{ebookId}.description: Collection of all E-Books uploaded to the library
